[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11110000 4
1 01101011 5
2 11111101 7
3 10010111 5
4 11011111 7
5 11111111 a
6 11100101 5
7 11111101 7
